description_long: This is a young adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt with a geometric emblem on the chest and sleeves. The hoodie displays a gradient tie-dye pattern, paired with slim-fit pants and classic lace-up sneakers. The individual wears large, square-framed glasses and a beanie hat, giving a modern, trendy appearance. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his facial features are stylized with a neutral expression. The overall build is slender and proportionate, with realistic human anatomy. The clothing and accessories suggest a contemporary streetwear style suitable for city environments.
description: A slender young adult male in trendy streetwear, including a hooded sweatshirt, slim pants, sneakers, glasses, and a beanie hat. The figure has a casual, modern urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the geometric emblem on the hoodie, glasses, beanie, and full facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, sleeve emblem, and sneaker details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hood, back of the sweatshirt, and back of the beanie.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, sleeve emblem, and relaxed hand posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt, slim-fit pants, beanie hat, and glasses
